calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration, Declaration And Memorandum
Off Calendar Aug-15-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom videoconference):
Plaintiff MARK SMITH (Tel: 415-410-8792) appearing in pro per;
Atty. SHARON NAGLE Esq. of Bold, Polisner, Maddow, Nelson & Judson (Tel: 925-933-7777) appearing for defendants K. Christal P. Colobong and Superior Court of California, County of San Francisco.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION.

Matter argued.

Having reviewed and considered all papers filed by the parties for this motion and having considered the parties' oral arguments, the Court rules as follows: Plaintiff's motion for reconsideration is denied. Plaintiff's further request for leave to amend the Complaint is denied.

Visiting Judge: Vincent J. Chiarello; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (210)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-21-2025 Off Calendar

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Continued To Apr-15-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 210
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS K. CHRISTAL COLOBONG, AND SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The matter will be heard in department 210 on 4/15/25 at 9:00 a.m.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Smith, Plaintiff in Pro Per, (415-410-8792; mmpcss@yahoo.com) appearing via ZoomGov
Sharon Nagle, Esq., Bold, Polisner, Maddow, Nelson & Judson, (925-933-777; snagle@bpmnj.com) appearing in person for Defendants

Matter argued.

After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:
DEMURRER to First Amended COMPLAINT - The Court will issue an order. Case Management Conference for May 7, 2025 is vacated.

Judge: Honorable Vincent Chiarello (Ret.); Clerk: K. Apolonio; Not reported. (210)
